'''Oblis''' was a technologically-advanced [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. It included large [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] deposits.<ref name="LFC">''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

Oblis was destroyed by a weapon powered by the [[Darkstaff]] before [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]. Its remnants became the [[Cularin asteroid belt]].

{{Planet-stub}}
